name: Eulalia Peel & Stick Wallpaper White/Black - Opalhouse™
description:
Give any room in your home an update without the mess or hassle of paint or traditional wallpaper with the Eulalia Peel and Stick Removable Wallpaper from Opalhouse™. This self-adhering wallpaper makes decorating as easy as can be - simply peel off and stick to the wall. The wallpaper has a pattern of donkeys, panthers, birds and plants that'll instantly give your space a unique feel. Use as a bold backdrop for neutral furniture and accessories, or go for an eclectic aesthetic by coordinating your space with fun patterned or brightly colored pieces.

This is your house. Where you create spaces as bold as your spirit. Collect objects as inspired as your dreams. Find pieces that remind you of every place you've been. Discover stories to inspire everywhere you have yet to go. This is Opalhouse™.
